zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Bliss於1674年6月1日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，她的父親Samuel Bliss50歲，母親Mary Leonard26歲。她於1697年11月10日與Samuel Ely Jr.在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1702年7月6日在她的家鄉享年28歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Bliss于1674年6月1日出生在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，她的父亲Samuel Bliss50岁，母亲Mary Leonard26岁。她于1697年11月10日与Samuel Ely Jr.在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1702年7月6日在她的家乡享年28岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Bliss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a cheerful person, from Middle English blisse ‘joy’. Compare Blissett .

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the village of Blay in Calvados, France, recorded in 1077 in the form Bleis. The village of Stoke Bliss in Worcestershire takes the second part of its name from a Norman family de Blez, recorded several times in the county from the 13th century.
German: nickname for a cheerful person, from Middle High German blīde ‘happy, friendly’. It is also found in France.

variants.name: Blish
meanings: English: rare variant of   Bliss  . The surname seems to have died out in Britain.

variants.name: Blissett
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Blisset or Blissot, apparently a pet form of Middle English bliss ‘gladness, joy’ used as a personal name.
variant of Blessed, from Middle English iblescede ‘blessed, happy, fortunate’. Compare Bleazard .

variants.name: Blitsch
meanings: German: variant of Bliss 3. The surname Blitsch is rare in Germany. Compare Blitch .

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Bliss was born on 1 June 1674, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States, her father, Samuel Bliss, was 50 and her mother, Mary Leonard, was 26. She married Samuel Ely Jr. on 10 November 1697, in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 6 July 1702, in her hometown, at the age of 28, and was buried in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Bliss est née le 1 juin 1674, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Samuel Bliss, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Mary Leonard, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Ely Jr. le 10 novembre 1697, à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 juillet 1702, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Martha Bliss am 1. Juni 1674 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Bliss 50 und ihre Mutter Mary Leonard 26. Sie hat am 10. November 1697 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Samuel Ely Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Juli 1702 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lei sposato Samuel Ely Jr. il 10 novembre 1697, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 luglio 1702, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Blissが1674年6月1日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父Samuel Blissは50歳，母Mary Leonardは26歳であった。1697年11月10日にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでSamuel Ely Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1702年7月6日に故郷で28歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: Martha Bliss(이)가 1674년 6월 1일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Bliss(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Leonard(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1697년 11월 10일 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Samuel Ely Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1702년 7월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Bliss nasceu em 1 de junho de 1674, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Samuel Bliss, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Mary Leonard, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Ely Jr. em 10 de novembro de 1697, em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de julho de 1702, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Bliss родилась 1 июня 1674 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Samuel Bliss было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Leonard, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Ely Jr. 10 ноября 1697 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 июля 1702 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Bliss nació el 1 de junio de 1674, en Springfield, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Samuel Bliss, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Mary Leonard, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Samuel Ely Jr. el 10 de noviembre de 1697, en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de julio de 1702, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
